title: Leaving Punk Hazard
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, G-5 Marines, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is leaving punk hazard.
scene: The scene focuses on leaving punk hazard, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, G-5 Marines, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Your "pirate Team" can have the tanker!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So don't cross over to our side!!

dialogue.speaker: G-5 Marines
dialogue.text: I've received word from the G-5 base.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And right after we became friends...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Luffy, you've got to stop him!!

summary: Leaving Punk Hazard. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
